title: bupleurum divaricatum f. humile
intro: Bupleurum divaricatum f. humile is a variety of the Bupleurum divaricatum plant, belonging to the Apiaceae family, commonly known as the small-flowered or dwarf hare's ear. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, Bupleurum divaricatum f. humile has been found to possess medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, improving liver function, and boosting the immune system. Bupleurum divaricatum f. humile can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, often in combination with other herbs like ginseng and licorice root, to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
